description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring a symmetrical arrangement of spherical beads in varying sizes and colors, strung together on a fine, likely metallic or synthetic thread. The central portion of the necklace showcases larger, highly polished metallic beads, possibly made of silver or stainless steel, interspersed with smaller, gold-toned beads for contrast. The beads gradually decrease in size as they extend toward the clasp, which is a simple circular fastener visible at the back. The necklace is displayed on a white, matte-finished jewelry bust, which accentuates the reflective surfaces of the beads. The overall design is elegant and modern, with a focus on geometric simplicity and metallic luster. This piece would be suitable for both casual and formal urban settings, adding a touch of sophistication to the wearer's attire.
description: A polished beaded necklace with alternating metallic and gold-toned spheres, arranged symmetrically and fastened with a circular clasp. The design is sleek and modern, emphasizing geometric simplicity and metallic shine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the necklace's profile, highlighting the gradual size transition of the beads and the way it drapes along the bust.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full symmetrical arrangement of beads, with the largest metallic beads centered and smaller beads tapering toward the ends.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the necklace's curvature and bead size progression.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the circular clasp and the way the necklace closes at the back of the bust.
